Localization.Description: A user tried to connect to a host without SSH authentication to check the host state

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}:{src.port} tried to connect to host {event_src.host} without SSH authentication to check the host state
The unknown user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}:{src.port} tried to connect to host {event_src.host} without SSH authentication to check the host state
